"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as AccordionPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-accordion"
import { ChevronDown } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Accordion = AccordionPrimitive.Root

const AccordionItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Item>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Item>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <AccordionPrimitive.Item
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("border-b", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
AccordionItem.displayName = "AccordionItem"


const accordionTriggerChevronDown = tw.style({
    height: "h-4",
    width: "w-4",
    flexShrink: "shrink-0",
    color: "text-muted-foreground",
    transitionProperty: "transition-transform",
    transitionDuration: "duration-200",
});

const accordionTriggerAccordionPrimitiveTrigger = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-between",
    padding: "py-4",
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    fontWeight: "font-medium",
    transitionProperty: "transition-all",
    hover: {
        textDecorationLine: "hover:underline",
    },
    textAlign: "text-left",
    "[&[data-state=open]>svg]": {
        rotate: "[&[data-state=open]>svg]:rotate-180",
    },
});

const AccordionTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <AccordionPrimitive.Header className={tw.join("flex")}>
    <AccordionPrimitive.Trigger
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.join(accordionTriggerAccordionPrimitiveTrigger.class(), className)}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
      <ChevronDown className={accordionTriggerChevronDown.class()} />
    </AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>
  </AccordionPrimitive.Header>
))
AccordionTrigger.displayName = AccordionPrimitive.Trigger.displayName

const AccordionContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <AccordionPrimitive.Content
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("overflow-hidden text-sm data-[state=closed]:animate-accordion-up data-[state=open]:animate-accordion-down")}
    {...props}
  >
    <div className={tw.join("pb-4 pt-0", className)}>{children}</div>
  </AccordionPrimitive.Content>
))
AccordionContent.displayName = AccordionPrimitive.Content.displayName

export { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent }
